title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Japan coach Moriyasu Hajime on Mitoma Kaoru omission: "It's a huge blow"
original_text:
FIFA World Cup 2026: Japan coach Moriyasu Hajime on Mitoma Kaoru omission: "It's a huge blow"
What Mitoma Kaoru means to Japan
The 28-year-old Mitoma was Moriyasu’s irreplaceable first choice on the left flank. In Qatar four years ago, he helped Japan to wins over Germany and Spain in the group phase before they lost to Croatia only on penalties in the round of 16. Moriyasu’s men also beat Brazil and England in recent friendlies.
There are high expectations for this Japan team to go deep at this year's tournament - at the very least to the nation’s first-ever quarter-finals - and Mitoma was a huge reason why.
The Samurai Blue have been drawn in Group F with the Netherlands (14 June), Tunisia (20 June) and Sweden (25 June).
“What Mitoma means to this team, anyone who has seen us play knows,” Moriyasu said. “He was leading by example on the pitch and had been in fantastic form playing in the Premier League week in, week out. There is no denying what he brought to us.
“But, for example, we found a way to beat Brazil without Mitoma, even though it was a friendly. Whoever plays, the next man always steps up and we function as a team. That has been our core principle. We want to show that we are capable of beating anyone in the world.
“I think he is feeling this more than anyone. I just hope he can get back to being the best version of himself in the near future.”
With squad depth being one of Japan’s strengths, whoever Moriyasu deploys as Mitoma’s replacement should hold his own and do an admirable job. There is every possibility Japan can still make a decent run in USA, Canada and Mexico.
That being said, there is no question Japan are a better team with Mitoma than without. And Moriyasu knows that better than anyone. The tears, sighs and the occasionally trembling voice said it all.
“I picked the 26 that gives us the best chance possible against the best teams in the world,” he said. “But I could only choose 26. There were a lot of players who I couldn’t pick and that’s what stands out to me.
“The players I’ve selected, I want them to let it all out when the time comes. But thinking about the ones I couldn’t pick, I get emotional thinking about them.”
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
